entries.definition:
returning III [n. of place/n.] a place for which a person is
destined; destination (3:162) أَفَمَنِ اتَّبَعَ رِضْوَانَ اللَّهِ كَمَنْ بَاءَ بِسَخَطٍ مِنَ اللَّهِ
وَمَأْوَاهُ جَهَنَّمُ وَبِئْسَ الْمَصِيرُ is the one who seeks to please God like the
one who has brought God’s wrath upon himself and whose home
will be Hell?–how foul a place [also: destination] in which to
end!

صِرْهُنَّ ṣirhunna (see ص/و/ر s-w-r).
entries.definition_english:
returning III [n. of place/n.] a place for which a person is
destined; destination (3:162) أَفَمَنِ اتَّبَعَ رِضْوَانَ اللَّهِ كَمَنْ بَاءَ بِسَخَطٍ مِنَ اللَّهِ

صِرْهُنَّ ṣirhunna (see ص/و/ر s-w-r).

entries.definition:
ṣ-y-ṣ long sharp cow-horn; spearhead; fortress, stronghold.
Of this root, صَيَاصِي sayāṣī, occurs once in the Qur’an.

صَيَاصِي sayāṣī [pl. of n. صِيصَة ṣīṣatun] fortresses, strongholds
(33:26) وَأَنْزَلَ الَّذِينَ ظَاهَرُوهُمْ مِنْ أَهْلِ الْكِتَابِ مِنْ صَيَاصِيهِمْ and He brought
those People of the Book who supported them down from their
stronghold.
